Shafi' Abbasi

Black and White Bird Perched on a Shrub
by Shafi' Abbasi
Iran, Isfahan, Safavid period (1501-1722) · 1651–52 · opaque watercolor, ink, and gold on paper
←Riza-yi Abbasi Scriptorium of Weingarten Abbey→
